# FlareSec.io

> Cloudflare security and performance solutions

## About

FlareSec.io provides expert guidance, tools, and resources for implementing Cloudflare's security and performance solutions. We help organizations protect their applications and optimize their digital presence using Cloudflare's global network.

## MCP Server

This site provides a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server at `/mcp` with tools to help AI assistants understand Cloudflare concepts.

### Available Tools

- `get_cloudflare_basics`: Get information about Cloudflare's core services and capabilities

## Resources

- Cloudflare Application Services
- Zero Trust Security (SASE)
- Developer Platform (Workers, Pages, R2)
- Network Services (DNS, WAF, DDoS)
- Performance Optimization

## Contact

For more information, visit the main site or connect with our team.

## Usage Notes

This site is optimized for LLM consumption. The MCP server provides structured access to Cloudflare knowledge and can help answer questions about implementation strategies, best practices, and technical concepts.
